tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,你校将于下月举办首届校园英语戏剧节。请给你的英国笔友 Tom 写一封邀请信。要点:(1) 戏剧节的时间和地点;(2) 主要演出剧目;(3) 你希望他能远程观看并提建议。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Next month your school will hold its first Campus English Drama Festival. Write an invitation letter to your British pen friend, Tom. Audience: Tom. Purpose: invite him to join the festival online. Cover: (1) the time and place of the festival; (2) the main plays to be performed; (3) why you hope he will watch it online and share his advice. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Tom' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three required points (time/place, plays, request for online viewing and advice) included
Warm, friendly tone suited to a pen friend
Correct future tense for the planned festival
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,你的英国朋友 Alice 想利用暑假来中国学习中文,但不知如何选择城市。请给她写一封建议信。要点:(1) 推荐一座你熟悉的城市;(2) 推荐理由(语言环境、生活成本等);(3) 提醒她注意的事项。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Your British friend Alice wants to study Chinese in China during her summer holiday but cannot decide which city to choose. Write a letter of suggestion to her. Audience: Alice. Purpose: recommend a suitable city. Cover: (1) one city you know well; (2) reasons for recommending it, such as language environment and living costs; (3) one or two things she should pay attention to. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Alice' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (city, reasons, reminders) addressed clearly
Logical, helpful tone offering genuine advice
Appropriate modal verbs for giving suggestions (could, might, should)
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你的外国朋友 Emma 计划开始学习中国书法,但不知如何入门。请给她写一封建议信。要点:(1) 入门所需的基本工具;(2) 练习的方法和步骤;(3) 鼓励她坚持。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Your foreign friend Emma plans to start learning Chinese calligraphy but does not know how to begin. Write a letter of suggestion to her. Audience: Emma. Purpose: advise her on how to start. Cover: (1) the basic tools she needs; (2) the methods and steps for practising; (3) encouragement to keep at it. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Emma' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (tools, methods/steps, encouragement) included
Helpful, clear and friendly tone
Correct use of sequencing words and imperatives for steps
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,学校环保社团成员。学校将开展"无塑料校园周"活动。请写一则英文通知,号召同学参与。要点:(1) 活动的时间和主题;(2) 同学们可以做的具体行动;(3) 活动的意义。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua, a member of the school's environmental club. The school will run a 'Plastic-Free Campus Week'. Write a notice in English calling on students to take part. Audience: all students. Purpose: inform and encourage action. Cover: (1) the time and theme of the activity; (2) the specific actions students can take; (3) the meaning of the activity. Word limit 80-120. Use the heading 'Notice' and sign as 'The Environmental Club'.
referencePoints: Notice format: title and signing body present
All three points (time/theme, actions, significance) included
Clear, motivating and formal tone
Accurate imperatives and time expressions
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model notice

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。某青少年英文网站征集以"一次失败教会我的事"为主题的文章。请写一篇投稿。要点:(1) 简述这次失败的经历;(2) 你从中学到的东西;(3) 它如何改变了你。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. A youth English website is collecting articles on the theme 'What a Failure Taught Me'. Write a piece to submit. Audience: young website readers. Purpose: share a lesson learned. Cover: (1) a brief account of the failure; (2) what you learned from it; (3) how it changed you. Word limit 80-120.
referencePoints: Clear narrative matching the given theme
All three points (the experience, the lesson, the change) developed
Honest and reflective tone
Correct past tense for events and present tense for lasting effects
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model essay

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你希望申请参加学校组织的赴乡村小学支教夏令营。请给负责老师写一封申请信。要点:(1) 你申请的原因;(2) 你能教授的科目或特长;(3) 你的决心。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. You wish to apply to join a summer camp organised by your school to teach at a rural primary school. Write an application letter to the teacher in charge. Audience: the teacher in charge. Purpose: apply to join the teaching camp. Cover: (1) why you are applying; (2) the subject or special skill you can teach; (3) your determination. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Teacher' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (reason, what you can teach, determination) included
Sincere, committed and respectful tone
Correct present tense for abilities and future tense for determination
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,学校汉语桥兴趣小组负责人。小组将为留学生开设一系列免费汉语体验课。请写一段活动介绍,发布给国际部学生。要点:(1) 课程的时间安排;(2) 课程主要内容;(3) 报名方式。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua, leader of the school's Chinese Bridge interest group. The group will offer a series of free Chinese experience lessons for international students. Write an introduction to the activity for students in the international department. Audience: international students. Purpose: introduce the lessons and invite sign-ups. Cover: (1) the lesson schedule; (2) the main content of the lessons; (3) how to sign up. Word limit 80-120.
referencePoints: Clear introduction with a welcoming opening
All three points (schedule, content, sign-up) included
Friendly, encouraging and informative tone
Correct future tense and clear scheduling language
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model text

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。前不久你在公交车上遗失了书包,一位陌生阿姨拾到后辗转送还给你。请给当地报社写一封感谢信,希望转达谢意。要点:(1) 叙述事情经过;(2) 表达感激之情;(3) 你对这种善举的看法。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Not long ago you lost your schoolbag on a bus, and a stranger, a kind woman, found it and went to great trouble to return it to you. Write a thank-you letter to the local newspaper, hoping it will pass on your gratitude. Audience: the newspaper and the kind woman. Purpose: express thanks publicly. Cover: (1) what happened; (2) your gratitude; (3) your view of such kind acts. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Editor' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (the event, gratitude, your view) included
Warm, grateful and sincere tone
Correct past tense for the event and present tense for your view
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你在小组合作完成英语项目时,因疏忽延误了进度,影响了组员 Lucy。请给她写一封道歉信。要点:(1) 承认错误并道歉;(2) 说明你将如何补救;(3) 表达对她的感谢。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. While working on a group English project, your carelessness delayed the progress and affected your teammate Lucy. Write a letter of apology to her. Audience: Lucy. Purpose: apologise and put things right. Cover: (1) admitting your mistake and apologising; (2) how you will make up for the delay; (3) your thanks to her. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Lucy' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (admission and apology, remedy, thanks) included
Honest, responsible and considerate tone
Correct past tense for the mistake and future tense for the remedy
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你校将举办"读书节"系列活动,届时有作家见面会。请给你喜爱的青年作家张华写一封邀请信。要点:(1) 读书节的时间和地点;(2) 你希望他做的事(如分享创作经历);(3) 学生对他的期待。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Your school will hold a series of 'Reading Festival' activities, including a meeting with a writer. Write an invitation letter to your favourite young writer, Zhang Hua. Audience: Zhang Hua. Purpose: invite him to the festival. Cover: (1) the time and place of the festival; (2) what you hope he will do, such as sharing his writing experience; (3) the students' expectations of him. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Mr. Zhang' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (time/place, request, expectations) included
Respectful, warm and sincere tone
Correct future tense and polite invitation expressions
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你的同桌林涛最近沉迷手机游戏,成绩下滑。作为朋友,请给他写一封建议信。要点:(1) 表达你的关心;(2) 分析过度玩游戏的影响;(3) 提出合理使用手机的建议。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Your deskmate Lin Tao has recently become addicted to mobile games, and his marks have dropped. As a friend, write a letter of suggestion to him. Audience: Lin Tao. Purpose: advise him kindly. Cover: (1) your concern for him; (2) the effects of playing games too much; (3) suggestions for using the phone sensibly. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Lin Tao' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (concern, effects, suggestions) included
Caring, tactful and non-judgemental tone
Appropriate suggestion and cause-effect structures
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,校园广播站负责人。学校将开展"光盘行动"宣传周。请写一则英文通知,倡议同学节约粮食。要点:(1) 宣传周的时间;(2) 倡议的具体做法;(3) 号召大家积极响应。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua, head of the campus radio station. The school will run a 'Clear Your Plate' publicity week. Write a notice in English calling on students to save food. Audience: all students. Purpose: promote saving food. Cover: (1) the time of the publicity week; (2) the specific things students should do; (3) a call for everyone to respond actively. Word limit 80-120. Use the heading 'Notice' and sign as 'The Campus Radio Station'.
referencePoints: Notice format: title and signing body present
All three points (time, specific actions, call to respond) included

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。一本面向中学生的英文季刊征集以"我的偶像"为主题的稿件。请写一篇投稿。要点:(1) 介绍你的偶像是谁;(2) 你欣赏他/她的原因;(3) 他/她对你的激励。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. An English quarterly for secondary students is collecting articles on the theme 'My Role Model'. Write a piece to submit. Audience: student readers of the quarterly. Purpose: introduce your role model. Cover: (1) who your role model is; (2) why you admire him or her; (3) how he or she inspires you. Word limit 80-120.

All three points (who, reasons, inspiration) developed

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你想申请担任本届校运动会的英语广播员。请给负责老师写一封申请信。要点:(1) 你的申请意愿;(2) 你的英语口语和广播经验;(3) 你对这份工作的理解。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. You want to apply to be the English announcer for this year's school sports meeting. Write an application letter to the teacher in charge. Audience: the teacher in charge. Purpose: apply for the announcer role. Cover: (1) your wish to apply; (2) your spoken English and any broadcasting experience; (3) your understanding of the job. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Teacher' and sign as 'Li Hua'.

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,校志愿者协会负责人。本周末协会将组织前往敬老院开展关爱活动。请写一段活动介绍,招募志愿者。要点:(1) 活动的时间、地点;(2) 主要活动内容;(3) 报名要求与方式。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua, head of the school volunteer association. This weekend the association will organise a caring visit to a nursing home. Write an introduction to the activity to recruit volunteers. Audience: students interested in volunteering. Purpose: introduce the activity and recruit volunteers. Cover: (1) the time and place of the activity; (2) the main activities planned; (3) the requirements and how to sign up. Word limit 80-120.

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你参加了一次海外短期游学,期间领队老师 Mr. Davis 给予你诸多照顾。回国后请给旅行机构写一封信,表扬这位领队。要点:(1) 说明此行情况;(2) 具体讲述他的帮助;(3) 表达感谢与赞扬。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. You took part in a short study tour abroad, during which your group leader Mr. Davis took good care of you. After returning home, write a letter to the travel agency to praise this leader. Audience: the travel agency. Purpose: praise the group leader and express thanks. Cover: (1) a brief account of the trip; (2) the specific help Mr. Davis gave; (3) your thanks and praise. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Sir or Madam' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: salutation and signature present
All three points (the trip, specific help, thanks and praise) included
Appreciative, positive and sincere tone
Correct past tense for the trip and clear examples
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华,班级英语课代表。由于你统计错误,导致几位同学的英语作业被漏登。请给英语老师 Ms. Reed 写一封道歉信。要点:(1) 说明失误并道歉;(2) 说明你的补救措施;(3) 保证今后认真。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua, the English class representative. Because of a counting mistake by you, several classmates' English homework was not recorded. Write a letter of apology to your English teacher, Ms. Reed. Audience: Ms. Reed. Purpose: apologise for the mistake. Cover: (1) explaining the mistake and apologising; (2) the steps you will take to fix it; (3) a promise to be careful from now on. Word limit 80-120. Begin with 'Dear Ms. Reed' and sign as 'Li Hua'.
referencePoints: Letter format: greeting and signature present
All three points (mistake and apology, remedy, promise) included
Sincere, responsible and respectful tone
Correct past tense for the mistake and future tense for the promise
Reference points guide scoring only; they are not a model letter

tasks.promptZh: 假设你是李华。你校摄影社将举办"镜头里的校园"主题摄影展。请给美术老师 Mr. Clark 写一封邀请信,请他出席并点评。要点:(1) 摄影展的时间、地点;(2) 展览的主题与规模;(3) 你希望他做的事。词数 80-120。
tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Your school photography club will hold a themed exhibition called 'Campus Through the Lens'. tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. Your British friend Sophie is about to travel to China for the first time and has asked you for advice on preparing. Write a letter of suggestion to her. Audience: Sophie. Purpose: advise her on travel preparation. Cover: (1) the best season to travel; (2) the things she should prepare; (3) one or two travel reminders. Word limit 80-120. All three points (season, items, reminders) included

tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua, manager of the school's English Learning Centre. The centre has added a batch of original English books and audio resources. Write a notice in English to inform students about borrowing. Audience: all students. Purpose: inform them about the new resources and borrowing. All three points (resource types, hours/rules, place) included

Accurate listing and precise time expressions

tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. An English-learning platform is collecting short articles on the theme 'How Technology Has Changed My Learning'. Write a piece to submit. Audience: platform readers. tasks.prompt: You are Li Hua. You want to apply to be an English interpreter volunteer for your city's international marathon. Write an application letter to the organising committee.
